Usage: cao launch [OPTIONS] [MESSAGE]

  Launch cao session with specified agent profile.

Options:
  --agents TEXT             Agent profile to launch  [required]
  --session-name TEXT       Name of the session (default: auto-generated)
  --headless                Launch in detached mode
  --provider TEXT           Provider to use (default: profile provider or
                            kiro_cli)
  --allowed-tools TEXT      Override allowedTools (CAO format: execute_bash,
                            fs_read, @cao-mcp-server). Repeatable.
  --async                   Send message and return immediately without
                            waiting for completion
  --auto-approve            Skip confirmation prompt (restrictions still
                            enforced).
  --yolo                    [DANGEROUS] Unrestricted tool access AND skip
                            confirmation prompts. Agent can execute ANY
                            command including aws, rm, curl.
  --working-directory TEXT  Working directory for the session (default:
                            current directory)
  --memory                  Also launch a context-manager (memory_manager)
                            terminal for curated memory injection.
  --env KEY=VALUE           Forward an env var to the supervisor AND every
                            worker spawned later in the same session.
                            Repeatable. Values travel in the request body, not
                            the URL. Blocked prefixes (CLAUDE/CODEX_/__MISE_)
                            and >=2048-byte values are rejected. See issue
                            #248.
  --help                    Show this message and exit.
